heading: Murder by escaped prisoners
label: 1120 Murder by escaped prisoners
notes: Amendments1996—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Federal correctional institution” for “Federal prison”.Pub. L. 104–294
amendments: Amendments1996—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Federal correctional institution” for “Federal prison”.Pub. L. 104–294

children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: a .—Definition
children.text: In this section, “Federal correctional institution” and “term of life imprisonment” have the meanings stated in section 1118.

children.heading: .—Offense and Penalty
children.label: b .—Offense and Penalty
children.text: A person, having escaped from a Federal correctional institution where the person was confined under a sentence for a term of life imprisonment, kills another shall be punished as provided in sections 1111 and 1112.
